description: Product Description Pretty Cotton Wool Pleat 80g Ingredients Cotton Wool Directions Gently dampen the cotton pad with your chosen cleanser or makeup remover. Lightly sweep the pad across your skin in circular motions to remove makeup or dirt. Avoid the eye area. After use, dispose of the pad in the trash. For hygiene purposes, do not reuse cotton pads. Safety Warning Do not swallow, keep out of reach os small children & babies See more
